name: telecareer-engine
description: テレキャリアエンジン - エンタメ業界専門求人マッチング

scripts.sync:media: mkdir -p public/img/media && cp -rn wordpress/engine/assets/img/media/. public/img/media/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: bash -c 'export NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_ID=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo dev) && npm run sync:media && next build && npm run build:standalone-assets'
scripts.build:standalone-assets: cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && mkdir -p .next/standalone/wordpress/seed && cp -r wordpress/seed .next/standalone/wordpress/ && cp wordpress/seed/demo-users.json .next/standalone/wordpress/seed/demo-users.json 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p .data && (test -f .next/standalone/.data/demo-users.json && test ! -f .data/demo-users.json && cp .next/standalone/.data/demo-users.json .data/demo-users.json || true)
scripts.start: cd .next/standalone && TELECAREER_PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd ../.. && pwd)" DEMO_PUBLIC_HTTPS=1 DEMO_DEBUG=1 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 PORT=3000 node server.js
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
